sourcesContent:
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { forecastingService } from '../api/dashboardServices'; import '../styles/ecoflow-3d-theme.css'; function Forecasting() { const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [forecasts, setForecasts] = useState([]); const [selectedBin, setSelectedBin] = useState(null); useEffect(() => { loadForecasts(); }, []); const loadForecasts = async () => { try { const data = await forecastingService.getAllForecasts(); setForecasts(data); } catch (err) { console.error(err); } finally { setLoading(false); } }; const getRiskColor = (risk) => { if (risk > 80) return '#ff2244'; if (risk > 60) return '#ffd93d'; return '#38ef7d'; }; const getRiskBadge = (risk) => { if (risk > 80) return 'critical'; if (risk > 60) return 'warning'; return 'success'; }; return (

🔮 Forecasting Dashboard

Predictive analytics and bin fill-level trends

{loading ? (
) : ( <> {/* Risk Overview */}
Critical Risk (6h)
{forecasts.filter(f => f.risk_6h > 80).length}
bins at risk
Warning Level (12h)
{forecasts.filter(f => f.risk_12h > 60 && f.risk_12h <= 80).length}
bins to monitor
Safe Level (24h)
{forecasts.filter(f => f.risk_24h <= 60).length}
bins healthy
Avg Growth Rate
{(forecasts.reduce((sum, f) => sum + f.growthPerHour, 0) / forecasts.length).toFixed(1)}%
per hour
{/* Forecast List */}
Bin Forecast Details
{forecasts.map((forecast, idx) => ( setSelectedBin(forecast)} className={forecast.risk_6h > 80 ? 'critical' : ''}> ))}
Bin ID Current Fill Growth/Hour 6h Forecast 12h Forecast 24h Forecast Risk Level
#{forecast.binId} {forecast.latestFillPct.toFixed(1)}% {forecast.growthPerHour.toFixed(2)}% {forecast.risk_6h.toFixed(1)}% {forecast.risk_12h.toFixed(1)}% {forecast.risk_24h.toFixed(1)}% {forecast.risk_6h > 80 ? '🔴 CRITICAL' : forecast.risk_6h > 60 ? '🟡 WARNING' : '🟢 SAFE'}
{/* Selected Bin Details */} {selectedBin && (
Bin #{selectedBin.binId} - Detailed Forecast
Current Level
{selectedBin.latestFillPct.toFixed(1)}%
Growth Rate
{selectedBin.growthPerHour.toFixed(2)}%/h
Time to Full
{Math.round((100 - selectedBin.latestFillPct) / selectedBin.growthPerHour)}h
{/* Forecast Timeline */}
Fill Level Timeline
Now
{selectedBin.latestFillPct.toFixed(0)}%
+6h
{selectedBin.risk_6h.toFixed(0)}%
+12h
{selectedBin.risk_12h.toFixed(0)}%
+24h
{selectedBin.risk_24h.toFixed(0)}%
)} )}
); } export default Forecasting;
